title: Price Marking Order 2004: government guidance
body: "This guidance provides information, explanation, and examples on the requirements of the Price Marking Order 2004.  It replaces previous government guidance and relates to:    the Price Marking Order 2004 (S.I 2004/102)  the Price Marking (Amendment) Order 2024 (S.I 2024/1055)  the Price Marking (Amendment) Order 2025 (S.I 2025/592)  "
